appName.title: Application Name
appName.description: The name of the app or SaaS you want to pitch.

appDescription.title: Application Description
appDescription.description: Describe what the app does, the problem it solves, and target audience.
appDescription.default: A HIPAA-compliant Electronic Health Records (EHR) platform for private medical practices. It automates patient intake, streamlines charting, integrates medical billing, and connects to labs via HL7 APIs, saving doctors 10+ hours of admin work per week.
appDescription.prefill: A HIPAA-compliant Electronic Health Records (EHR) platform for private medical practices. It automates patient intake, streamlines charting, integrates medical billing, and connects to labs via HL7 APIs, saving doctors 10+ hours of admin work per week.

targetNiche.title: Target Niche/Industry
targetNiche.description: E.g. HealthTech, B2B SaaS, FinTech, AI, EdTech.

investorUrls.title: Target Investor URLs
investorUrls.description: Explicit venture capital website URLs or investor profiles to crawl.

url.title: Investor Domain/URL
url.description: The URL of the investor website.

autoDiscover.title: Auto Discover Target Investors
autoDiscover.description: Automatically search public directories for VCs that match your target niche if target URLs list is empty.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key (Optional)
openaiApiKey.description: Your OpenAI API Key for customized AI pitch generation. If omitted, a B2B fallback template engine will compile the email.

projectPath.title: Local Project Path
projectPath.description: Path to the local project codebase to study.

geminiApiKey.title: Gemini API Key (Optional)
geminiApiKey.description: Google Gemini API Key. Will fallback to env or target project .env if omitted.

emailTo.title: Outreach Recipient Email
emailTo.description: The email address to send the generated pitch to.

outreachChannel.title: Outreach Channel
outreachChannel.description: The channel to use for outreach delivery.

gmailAccount.title: Gmail Account (for GOG)
gmailAccount.description: The Gmail address associated with GOG to send from.

useCodexOAuth.title: Use OpenAI Codex OAuth
useCodexOAuth.description: Initiate OpenAI Codex device-code OAuth flow for API commands.
